text.title: prompt-cache-prefix-order Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for prompt-cache-prefix-order as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tools go in the SDK's tools field at the top of the request; placement is enforced by SDK.

failure-mode.description: User name interpolated into system prompt
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Move user-specific data to the user message; keep system stable.

failure-mode.description: Conversation history truncated mid-prefix on each turn
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Truncate from the OLDEST end and add a fresh cache_control breakpoint after each truncation.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Anthropic supports up to 4 — use them deliberately, not redundantly.

failure-mode.description: Forgetting cache_control entirely on Claude — assuming "cache is automatic"
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Anthropic ephemeral caching is OPT-IN via cache_control.
